latest.title: AWS a cloud platform
latest.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is a comprehensive cloud platform providing fully managed services for computing, storage, and databases on a global infrastructure.It enables businesses to scale faster, reduce costs, and deploy applications instantly using a pay-as-you-go model. latest.title: What is AWS Cloud Club? And Why Every Campus Should Have One
latest.description:
Many students today are interested in cloud computing, DevOps, and modern technologies. But one common challenge is that most students don’t know where to start or how to learn in a practical way. Learning alone through tutorials can feel confusing and slow.

This is where AWS Cloud Club becomes important. It creates a space where students can learn together, build real projects, and grow step by step with proper guidance.

latest.title: Getting Started with AWS for Beginners
latest.description: AWS is a cloud platform that lets you build and run applications without owning physical servers. Instead of buying hardware, you use online services like virtual machines, storage, and databases, and pay only for what you use. It helps developers quickly deploy apps, scale easily, and focus more on coding rather than managing infrastructure.

latest.description:

Grateful to be part of such an amazing space where people share knowledge, ideas, and real-world experiences with AWS. Looking forward to contributing, learning new things, and connecting with fellow cloud enthusiasts. 🚀

latest.title: Do Campo à Cloud: A jornada de um Líder Estudantil da AWS
latest.description: Troquei o trabalho na fazenda pelos códigos e pela nuvem. Veja como a nossa origem é o combustível para alcançarmos lugares que nunca imaginamos.

latest.title: Deploying my first AWS Project
latest.description: For a student, getting started with AWS can seem like a daunting task. However, in this article, I uncover the steps I took to utilize AWS to its fullest extent to host my first web deployment for a personal project.

latest.title: Building in Public: Why Your Journey Matters More Than Your Code
latest.description: You are not alone if you have felt a gap between university coding and real-world infrastructure. The AWS Builder Center bridges that gap through its focus on community. What sets a student apart in today’s industry is not just the code they write, but the way they engage with the global community of creators.

latest.title: Além do Cloud: Como a Tecnologia e as Pessoas Transformam Realidades
latest.description: Junior Cloud Data Engineer e AWS Student Builder Leader em Belém. Mostro como o fundamento técnico em dados e a força da comunidade transformam realidades. Menos clickbait, mais fundamento!

latest.title: Keeping up as a Mechanical Engineer in the World of AI
latest.description: How can mechanical engineering students keep up with rapidly evolving technology and make a meaningful impact in industry?

latest.title: Nuvem sem barreiras: A tecnologia como ferramenta de protagonismo para estudantes de todas as áreas e não só computação.
latest.description: Neste artigo, mostro que a nuvem não é exclusividade da TI e como ela é essencial em áreas como a engenharia biomédica. Compartilho minha jornada no programa de líder estudantil da AWS para apresentar como qualquer estudante pode aprender tecnologia do zero com cursos gratuitos. Também discuto a importância da representatividade feminina para motivar mais mulheres nesse espaço.

latest.title: Minha primeira semana como Líder Estudantil na AWS Builder Center: O que eu aprendi?
latest.description: Como eu lidei com meus primeiros desafios do projeto e de que forma isso pode ajudar você.

latest.title: Minha primeira semana no AWS Builder Center: O que eu aprendi?
latest.description: Esse artigo busca descrever uma primeira experiência no Builder Center e explorar brevemente a plataforma.

latest.title: Como o Amazon Q Transformou Minha Jornada de Aprendizado em Cloud e Arquitetura de Sistemas
latest.description: Descubra como o Amazon Q pode acelerar seu aprendizado em cloud computing, ajudando estudantes a entender arquiteturas de sistemas e analisar código de forma prática e eficiente.

trending.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
trending.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
trending.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Infinite Storefront – Eradicating the E-Commerce Return Crisis
trending.description: Infinite Storefront is a decentralized B2B2C sizing infrastructure eradicating the $890B e-commerce return crisis. Using a Multi-Axis Matrix and Amazon Bedrock, it proves garment fit mathematically before visual rendering. Built on 100% AWS serverless architecture, it equips independent boutiques with enterprise AI in under 4 minutes. By routing shoppers to local inventory for pickup, it bypasses reverse logistics entirely, turning retail margin protection into global climate action.
